# StateMachine \- Commitment App 

##  ![][image1] 

1. ## Check-in Pending \-\> Pending Verification

   **Trigger:** Challenger submitting proof of work   
   **Initiator:** Challenge  
   **CTA:** Check-in Pending to None  
   **Preconditions:**   
   \- The challenger should have sent no check-in for that day  
   \- Challenge should be live/active  
   \- Current Date \<= Challenge End Date  
   \- Check-in Time (When the check-in was submitted) \<= Deadline Time  
   \- Challenge Status \!= Challenge Failed  
   \- Challenge Status \= ‘Check-in Pending’  
   **Database Changes:**  
   \- Create a record for proof of work submission  
   \- Create a record for proof of work  
   \- Record the proof of work metadata  
   \- Update the challenge status for both challengers and companions  
   **Side Effects:**  
   \- Modify CTA for Challenger from ‘Check-in’ to None  
   \- Modify CTA for Companions from None to ‘Verify’  
   \- Trigger relevant notifications   
   **Next Possible Steps:**   
   Pending Verification \-\> Check-in Done  
   Pending Verification \-\> Check-in Failed   
   

2. ## Pending Verification \-\> Check-in Done

   **Trigger:** all Companions have verified the check-in  
   **Initiator:** Companions   
   **CTA:** Challengers: None \-\> None (after the companion acts on this)  
   	Companion: Verify to None  
   **Preconditions:**   
- All companions have verified the request  
- No companion has rejected the request  
- Check-in Time \<=Deadline time  
- All companions have acted on the verification request, accepting the check-in   
- Challenge is Live/Active   
- Current Date \<= Challenge End Date  
- Challenge Status \!= Challenge Failed  
  **Database Changes:**  
- Record Check-in Validation Response of each companion  
- Record the time of check-in validation of each companion  
  **Side Effects:**  
- Trigger relevant notifications  
- Change the challenge status for both Champions and Challengers:  
  - Challenger: Pending Verification \-\> Check-in Done  
  - Companion: Pending Verification \-\> Check-in Done

  **Next Possible Steps:**  
    Check-in Done \-\> Check-in Pending \[next day\]

3. ## Pending Verification \-\> Check-in Pending

   **Trigger:** companion rejects the check-in request  
   **Initiator:** Companion   
   **CTA:** Challenger: Pending Validation \-\> Check-in Pending  
   	Companion: Pending Validation \-\> Check-in Pending  
   **Preconditions:**   
- At least one companion rejects the check-in requests  
- Check-in Time \<=Deadline time  
- All companions have acted on the request  
- Challenge is Live  
- Current Date \<= Challenge End Date  
- Challenge Status \!= Challenge Failed  
  **Database Changes:**  
- Record Check-in Validation Response of each companion  
- Record the time of check-in validation of each companion  
  **Side Effects:**  
- Trigger relevant notifications  
- Change the challenge status for both Champions and Challengers to the relevant statuses  
  **Next Possible Steps**   
  Check-in Pending \-\> Pending Verification

4. ## Check-in Pending \-\> Check-in Missed

   **Trigger:** challenger missed sending the proof of work   
   **Initiator:** challenger \[misses their check-in\]  
   **CTA:** Pending Verification \-\> None  
   **Preconditions:**   
- Challenger misses sending proof of work   
- No check-in until the deadline time   
- Number of available spans   
- Check-in Time \<=Deadline time  
- All companions have acted on the request  
- Challenge is Live  
- Current Date \<= Challenge End Date  
- Challenge Status \!= Challenge Failed  
  **Database Changes:**  
- Register the event of the challenger missing the event  
  **Side Effects:**  
- Trigger relevant notifications  
- Change the challenge status for both Champions and Challengers”   
  - Challenger: Pending Verification \-\> 

  **Next Possible Steps:**  

- Check-in Missed \-\> Check-in Pending

5. ## Pending Verification \-\> Check-in Pending \[Special Case\]

	**Special Case**: companion validation is delayed over the next day  
**Trigger:** at least one companion fails to verify the proof of work before the deadline time  
**Initiator:** companion \[fails to verify the request before the deadline for the day\]   
**Companion Status: ‘**Pending Verification’ (only for the companion yet to verify the request even on the next day)  
**CTA:**   
Companion: Verify \[day after the deadline was breached\]  
		Challenger: Check-in \[for the daily challenge\]  
**Preconditions:** 

- At least one companion has NOT acted on a verification request post deadline time  
- Current time \>= deadline time for that day  
- At least one companion is yet act on the verification request before the deadline ends  
- Current day \<= Challenge End Date   
- Challenge is live/Active  
  **Remember:**  
- In  this case it is important to provide different experiences for:   
  - Companions who are yet to give their approval , even after the deadline, to have the status as ‘Pending Verification’  
  - Companions who have given their approval, show them the normal flow status i.e. \- ‘Pending Verification’


[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
